description: BTP Containment - open-source IAM containment tooling

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.btpc.admin
scopes.description: Enroll subaccounts, upload service-key credentials, manage IAS tenants, conflict-set definitions, protected users, audit sink config, origin profiles.

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.btpc.responder
scopes.description: Incident-response: lock + unlock users only. Cannot upload credentials, manage config, or run SoD scans.

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.btpc.sod_viewer
scopes.description: Read SoD conflict-set definitions and findings; can trigger SoD scans. No mutation rights on identities.

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.btpc.viewer
scopes.description: Read-only access to subaccounts, audit log, scan results.

role-templates.name: BtpContainmentAdmin
role-templates.description: Full admin: every scope the app exposes. Use for the platform owner / on-call lead.

role-templates.name: BtpContainmentResponder
role-templates.description: Incident responder: contain + unlock users only. Cannot upload credentials, cannot change config, cannot run SoD scans.

role-templates.name: BtpContainmentSodViewer
role-templates.description: SoC / GRC analyst: review SoD conflict sets and findings, trigger scans. Cannot mutate identities.

role-templates.name: BtpContainmentViewer
role-templates.description: Read-only: subaccount inventory, audit log timeline, scan results. No actions.

role-collections.name: BTP Containment Incident Responder
role-collections.description: Grants the responder role template (lock / unlock only).

role-collections.name: BTP Containment SoD Viewer
role-collections.description: Grants the sod_viewer role template (read findings, run scans).
